phases.phase2_technical: completed — 4 brainstorming rounds with inline research
phases.phase3_scope: tier_0_solo — all context available from brainstorming

key_decisions.injection_bridge: _client module-level var in __init__.py — LLM never sees it, one monkeypatch controls all tools
key_decisions.no_sleep_target: asyncio.sleep via monkeypatch.setattr — http.py uses module-level asyncio.sleep lookup
key_decisions.assert_all_mocked_kwarg: assert_all_mocked=True verified at respx/router.py:44; enforcement works via async_handler→aresolve→resolver context manager (router.py:249)
key_decisions.mcp_shared_memory_import: from mcp.shared.memory import create_connected_server_and_client_session — verified in venv

issues.description: Task F referenced ts_ruling.txt for document GET; correct fixture is ts_ruling.pdf
issues.resolution: Task F updated to reference ts_ruling.pdf; factory document_bytes param added

issues.description: make_cendoj_client factory had no way to mock the document GET route needed by get_ruling_text resource test
issues.resolution: Factory extended with document_url and document_bytes optional params; Task C snippet updated

issues.description: Task E did not mention removing local mem_cache fixture from test_document.py before injecting disk_cache
issues.resolution: Task E updated: explicitly remove local mem_cache fixture; use conftest disk_cache instead

issues.description: Task F didn't clarify that read_resource() returns ReadResourceResult; assertion should use result.contents[0].text
issues.resolution: Task F updated to explicitly state result.contents[0].text assertion
Verified in .venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/respx/router.py:44 — kwarg is assert_all_mocked, default True. FALSE POSITIVE — plan was already correct.

issues.description: mcp.shared.memory import path was flagged as unverified
issues.resolution: Already verified in venv before plan was written. FALSE POSITIVE — import works correctly.

issues.description: monkeypatch.setattr(mcp_cendoj, '_client', client) was claimed to have incorrect syntax
issues.resolution: pytest.MonkeyPatch.setattr(obj, name, value) is correct 3-arg form. FALSE POSITIVE — reviewer was wrong.

issues.description: assert_all_mocked enforcement via async_handler was not verified
issues.resolution: Verified: async_handler → aresolve → resolver context manager (router.py:241-264) → checks _assert_all_mocked at line 249. Enforcement DOES work through async_handler.

issues.description: Task B did not explicitly state to add 'from mcp_cendoj.http import CendojClient' import
issues.resolution: Task B updated with explicit import code snippet and type annotation

issues.description: No test to validate _no_sleep fixture actually patches asyncio.sleep
issues.resolution: Added test_no_sleep_fixture_actually_patches smoke test to Task C acceptance criteria

issues.description: Tasks C and D must be committed together to avoid double-patching confusion
issues.resolution: Added ATOMICITY REQUIREMENT block before Task D; both tasks must be in same commit

issues.description: Suite speed target ~1s was unrealistic; non-sleep overhead not accounted for
issues.resolution: Updated target to ≤3s in Task C, Test Plan table, and _no_sleep fixture docstring

issues.description: assert_all_mocked enforcement via async_handler was uncertain (same as IR-004)
issues.resolution: Verified: enforcement works. See IR-004. FALSE POSITIVE.

issues.description: mcp_session fixture had no guard against _client=None — silent real network access if test forgets injection
issues.resolution: mcp_session fixture updated with fail-loud sentinel: monkeypatch.setattr('mcp_cendoj._client', object()) before yielding session. Tests must override sentinel before calling any tool.

issues.description: Tasks C and D must be atomic commit (same as PR-002)
issues.resolution: Consolidated with PR-002. See ATOMICITY REQUIREMENT block in plan.
